channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree in lane behind my property is hanging 30 feet over my garden, 16th June
item.description:
The tree is at the back of 15 CARLYLE GROVE ,CHELTENHAM , GL51 0PW
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Carlyle Grove, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees and foliage blocking speed limit sign, 16th June
item.description:
Near to Spinners Road, Brockworth
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Spinners Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tress and foliage blocking road speed limit, 16th June
item.description:
Near mini roundabout coming down the road, near alley way with steep slope - opposite Abbotswood
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75, Ermin Street, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole next to manhole cover, 16th June
item.description:
Hole is next to manhole - between bushcombe close and station road junction
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bushcombe Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 16th June
item.description:
Cway pothole 15DB 500mm x 500mm x 41mm NSD x 1 Temporary road closure TM required (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: Tree blocking Byway Open to All Traffic, 16th June
item.description:
The Byway is overgrown along most of its length... Not passable on horseback

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashchurch Rural, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road
